## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Tavrn and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows strong early signals, with traffic nearing month 4 levels of other clients](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Focus shift to retrieval-centric content, pausing AI-related topics (esp. paralegal-focused)](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [New content clusters for retrieval developed, spanning full funnel](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Tavrn to provide internal sales/product docs to enhance content accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [Pausing AI-focused content, especially paralegal-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Shifting focus to retrieval-centric content across the full funnel](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Continuing legal reference and state-by-state content due to high engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Introducing case analysis pieces (1/week) based on strong performance](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

### Content Performance

  - [Early signals show promising results after just 3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Traffic levels approaching month 4 performance of more niche clients](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Low difficulty keywords and minimal content competition contributing to quick gains](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Google Search Console data shows consistent growth (partial week data already strong)](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)

### New Content Development

  - [Full cluster of retrieval-focused content assignments created](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Mixture of top, middle, and bottom funnel content planned](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [6 case analysis pieces approved by Pedro to be published (1/week)](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Continued development of legal reference and state-by-state content](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Internal Document Sharing

  - [Request for Tavrn's internal sales/product decks to enhance content accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Kellie to share:](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [Product page copy for retrieval and chronologies (not yet published)](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [Potential sales playbook/value proposition documents](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [GrowthX's new pipelines can efficiently parse and utilize these documents](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Kellie unable to review this week's articles, will provide feedback by end of day/tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Commitment to keep up with blog reviews to maintain publishing momentum](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement retrieval-focused content into upcoming calendar](https://fathom.video/share/Mc_kayGywqwxJF9y2xhRgYb1zzYiYhXz?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
